description: Solution architect. Reads BRIEF.md and produces ARCHITECTURE.md with recommended stack, alternatives, trade-offs, FDPO identity plan, cost estimate, and parallelization tracks for downstream Dev fan-out. Advisory only — does not write app code or IaC.
shouldTriggerPrompts: design the architecture for the Aon claims POC
what stack should I use for a RAG chatbot — App Service or Container Apps?
compare Functions vs Container Apps for an event-driven workload
give me a trade-off analysis between Cosmos DB and Azure SQL for this scenario
what's the recommended Azure architecture for a multi-tenant document processing app?
lay out the parallelization tracks so we can fan out dev
estimate the monthly cost of the proposed stack
design an FDPO-compliant identity plan for the API
what's the reference architecture for AI Foundry + AI Search RAG?
shouldNotTriggerPrompts: render the C4 diagram as PNG
scope a new POC for Allstate
